eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Maine; at 10:55 AM on MAR 21, 2019 Effective until 11:40 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a coordinated monthly test of the Emergency Alert System for the State of Maine.  If this were an actual emergency official information would follow the alert tones.  This is a test.
